title: Verify self-contained local operation
preconditions: Network access is disabled and no Tally daemon, watcher, scheduler, service, port, or background process is running.
steps: Execute every accepted workflow and operational failure path required by NFR-BUDGET-SELF-CONTAINED-LOCAL-OPERATION, then inspect process and network state.
expected: Every workflow completes non-interactively and leaves no network dependency or background resource before or after invocation.
